# SRS Wall Kick Offset Data

## Standard Pieces (J, L, S, T, Z)

### Rotation State → 0=spawn, 1=CW, 2=180°, 3=CCW

| From → To | Test 1 | Test 2   | Test 3   | Test 4   | Test 5   |
|-----------|--------|----------|----------|----------|----------|
| 0 → 1     | (0,0)  | (-1, 0)  | (-1,+1)  | (0,-2)   | (-1,-2)  |
| 1 → 0     | (0,0)  | (+1, 0)  | (+1,-1)  | (0,+2)   | (+1,+2)  |
| 1 → 2     | (0,0)  | (+1, 0)  | (+1,-1)  | (0,+2)   | (+1,+2)  |
| 2 → 1     | (0,0)  | (-1, 0)  | (-1,+1)  | (0,-2)   | (-1,-2)  |
| 2 → 3     | (0,0)  | (+1, 0)  | (+1,+1)  | (0,-2)   | (+1,-2)  |
| 3 → 2     | (0,0)  | (-1, 0)  | (-1,-1)  | (0,+2)   | (-1,+2)  |
| 3 → 0     | (0,0)  | (-1, 0)  | (-1,-1)  | (0,+2)   | (-1,+2)  |
| 0 → 3     | (0,0)  | (+1, 0)  | (+1,+1)  | (0,-2)   | (+1,-2)  |

## I-Piece

| From → To | Test 1 | Test 2   | Test 3   | Test 4   | Test 5   |
|-----------|--------|----------|----------|----------|----------|
| 0 → 1     | (0,0)  | (-2, 0)  | (+1, 0)  | (-2,-1)  | (+1,+2)  |
| 1 → 0     | (0,0)  | (+2, 0)  | (-1, 0)  | (+2,+1)  | (-1,-2)  |
| 1 → 2     | (0,0)  | (-1, 0)  | (+2, 0)  | (-1,+2)  | (+2,-1)  |
| 2 → 1     | (0,0)  | (+1, 0)  | (-2, 0)  | (+1,-2)  | (-2,+1)  |
| 2 → 3     | (0,0)  | (+2, 0)  | (-1, 0)  | (+2,+1)  | (-1,-2)  |
| 3 → 2     | (0,0)  | (-2, 0)  | (+1, 0)  | (-2,-1)  | (+1,+2)  |
| 3 → 0     | (0,0)  | (+1, 0)  | (-2, 0)  | (+1,-2)  | (-2,+1)  |
| 0 → 3     | (0,0)  | (-1, 0)  | (+2, 0)  | (-1,+2)  | (+2,-1)  |

## O-Piece
The O-piece does not wall kick — rotation has no effect.

## How Wall Kicks Work
1. Try rotating the piece normally (Test 1: offset 0,0)
2. If collision, try each subsequent test offset
3. If any test succeeds, use that position
4. If all 5 tests fail, rotation is denied
